subcodes.first_line: ...It [Hidden Word #25] means that there are degrees in the world of existence. However much the inferior degree may progress
subcodes.first_line_orig: و امّا مسئلهٴ ثانی در آیهٴ ٢٥ کلمات مکنونه مقصود این است که در عالم وجود مراتب است
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
